	+ x*(22*x^65 + 220*x^64 + 1237*x^63 + 5192*x^62 + 18172*x^61 - 70551404*x^60 + 188443717*x^59 - 574538624*x^58 + 509156296*x^57 - 690326956*x^56 - 743764450*x^55 + 44087868*x^54 - 1890754246*x^53 - 1943280157*x^52 - 3069701039*x^51 - 7514103829*x^50 - 17472608239*x^49 - 44467481074*x^48 + 43189900506*x^47 - 483862555799*x^46 + 899544302569*x^45 - 2146987223219*x^44 + 2909124025261*x^43 - 3619289283227*x^42 + 3268000686424*x^41 - 1512591591280*x^40 + 637169173526*x^39 + 1921169505746*x^38 - 807551455783*x^37 + 2159303826135*x^36 - 54761996483*x^35 + 667643339379*x^34 + 130147736380*x^33 - 199683231973*x^32 - 260685045975*x^31 - 254689438866*x^30 + 85509954578*x^29 + 656144296800*x^28 + 1420863467336*x^27 + 2033281054115*x^26 + 2617857871915*x^25 + 2239087150968*x^24 + 2013380649274*x^23 + 423663652427*x^22 - 320331993640*x^21 - 1905669558743*x^20 - 2212205814985*x^19 - 2672306841132*x^18 - 2222885935738*x^17 - 1808440162605*x^16 - 1166726408153*x^15 - 703464964636*x^14 - 346635427462*x^13 - 153732237926*x^12 - 54273805342*x^11 - 16531020493*x^10 - 3633364150*x^9 - 729133517*x^8 - 130489724*x^7 - 60663392*x^6 - 25351747*x^5 - 9316469*x^4 - 2915840*x^3 - 738751*x^2 - 137835*x - 15180)*y^12
	- x*(x^63 + 11*x^62 + 66*x^61 + 286*x^60 + 1001*x^59 - 23532817*x^58 + 50441908*x^57 - 148615632*x^56 + 76703286*x^55 - 144432442*x^54 - 252311807*x^53 - 150939311*x^52 - 527331511*x^51 - 854296374*x^50 - 1473286743*x^49 - 3077684962*x^48 - 6699075224*x^47 - 15034557755*x^46 + 13531345325*x^45 - 140400743943*x^44 + 262736914640*x^43 - 561351974325*x^42 + 770919609863*x^41 - 845727345775*x^40 + 814902661959*x^39 - 323399707200*x^38 + 243177374320*x^37 + 317924131637*x^36 - 53452505717*x^35 + 311660397163*x^34 + 1094192510*x^33 + 80294388353*x^32 + 6499009429*x^31 + 2308772603*x^30 + 28974464669*x^29 + 88713534455*x^28 + 176928261274*x^27 + 269620034447*x^26 + 343029953918*x^25 + 340086911230*x^24 + 304766595930*x^23 + 117004035053*x^22 - 1664645416*x^21 - 259540638238*x^20 - 321026406442*x^19 - 446861182865*x^18 - 380022686220*x^17 - 343829070088*x^16 - 226855693905*x^15 - 150224011338*x^14 - 75954582278*x^13 - 36860463218*x^12 - 13311443388*x^11 - 4429541380*x^10 - 936479038*x^9 - 178697024*x^8 - 7963065*x^7 - 3717599*x^6 - 1570165*x^5 - 586567*x^4 - 187529*x^3 - 48687*x^2 - 9319*x - 1035)*y^11
	- x*(6724520*x^56 - 10666480*x^55 + 32231320*x^54 - 1964248*x^53 + 31078465*x^52 + 70008890*x^51 + 79188095*x^50 + 158702808*x^49 + 288791874*x^48 + 522248214*x^47 + 1008883919*x^46 + 2019701603*x^45 + 4104793978*x^44 - 4418963145*x^43 + 35129489903*x^42 - 68278703422*x^41 + 126657999886*x^40 - 177102452772*x^39 + 168213092757*x^38 - 170926554158*x^37 + 57312774212*x^36 - 58767444996*x^35 - 43152237329*x^34 - 5047590539*x^33 - 36904351014*x^32 - 4601664254*x^31 - 12078583733*x^30 - 7805663436*x^29 - 13147061005*x^28 - 20966321302*x^27 - 30882549272*x^26 - 39216882819*x^25 - 42277289472*x^24 - 37867460725*x^23 - 20924092804*x^22 - 3152884364*x^21 + 28618835347*x^20 + 41223200155*x^19 + 63450100636*x^18 + 56484139112*x^17 + 56448213037*x^16 + 38275429379*x^15 + 28027921772*x^14 + 14503024754*x^13 + 7807047480*x^12 + 2876986330*x^11 + 1075121300*x^10 + 227184826*x^9 + 49540128*x^8 + 321321*x^7 + 150216*x^6 + 63987*x^5 + 24270*x^4 + 7923*x^3 + 2108*x^2 + 413*x + 46)*y^10
	+ x*(1623160*x^54 - 1623160*x^53 + 5874792*x^52 + 2943941*x^51 + 7506877*x^50 + 16815855*x^49 + 25462077*x^48 + 44397081*x^47 + 79564432*x^46 + 142995034*x^45 + 261538750*x^44 + 485226176*x^43 + 904593735*x^42 - 1361953407*x^41 + 7547865421*x^40 - 15526370056*x^39 + 24442733320*x^38 - 34755598566*x^37 + 28082911874*x^36 - 29787793077*x^35 + 8204630378*x^34 - 10560767284*x^33 - 4875883554*x^32 - 2360605213*x^31 - 3874774351*x^30 - 1616440746*x^29 - 2239964558*x^28 - 2393812907*x^27 - 3173561008*x^26 - 3865663116*x^25 - 4222547382*x^24 - 3849657285*x^23 - 2529527844*x^22 - 434927753*x^21 + 2618748743*x^20 + 4730376956*x^19 + 7503776957*x^18 + 7281290594*x^17 + 7809748794*x^16 + 5558313533*x^15 + 4466663666*x^14 + 2384225570*x^13 + 1428965218*x^12 + 537747142*x^11 + 228102702*x^10 + 48512662*x^9 + 12633126*x^8 + 6435*x^7 + 3003*x^6 + 1287*x^5 + 495*x^4 + 165*x^3 + 45*x^2 + 9*x + 1)*y^9
	- x^9*(324632*x^44 - 125664*x^43 + 920227*x^42 + 1050770*x^41 + 1811145*x^40 + 3571846*x^39 + 6059759*x^38 + 10291195*x^37 + 17726258*x^36 + 30678304*x^35 + 53177305*x^34 + 92095594*x^33 + 158768361*x^32 - 365411725*x^31 + 1384358807*x^30 - 3035204251*x^29 + 3982394724*x^28 - 5727344098*x^27 + 3855521597*x^26 - 4239426710*x^25 + 911248995*x^24 - 1454258393*x^23 - 468626026*x^22 - 420876762*x^21 - 374538288*x^20 - 280247931*x^19 - 304998459*x^18 - 323224457*x^17 - 335600055*x^16 - 301010841*x^15 - 197225995*x^14 - 14444249*x^13 + 231369530*x^12 + 481002693*x^11 + 738760024*x^10 + 804367847*x^9 + 889033789*x^8 + 686653182*x^7 + 591725867*x^6 + 333239213*x^5 + 220397926*x^4 + 85683836*x^3 + 41221950*x^2 + 8876448*x + 2760681)*y^8
	+ x^9*(52360*x^42 + 13090*x^41 + 129710*x^40 + 220430*x^39 + 367581*x^38 + 652056*x^37 + 1115564*x^36 + 1865454*x^35 + 3090277*x^34 + 5087679*x^33 + 8314680*x^32 + 13460339*x^31 + 21540805*x^30 - 81758346*x^29 + 215018352*x^28 - 499919076*x^27 + 538118709*x^26 - 774900704*x^25 + 423447941*x^24 - 479305253*x^23 + 74950661*x^22 - 149520672*x^21 - 36376599*x^20 - 43681253*x^19 - 27674927*x^18 - 23812800*x^17 - 20028441*x^16 - 15376643*x^15 - 6942540*x^14 + 5994632*x^13 + 23286583*x^12 + 43229529*x^11 + 62243506*x^10 + 74215198*x^9 + 81852450*x^8 + 70538136*x^7 + 63195482*x^6 + 38880049*x^5 + 27769266*x^4 + 11454331*x^3 + 6171942*x^2 + 1369074*x + 501942)*y^7
	- x^9*(6545*x^40 + 5950*x^39 + 16905*x^38 + 32841*x^37 + 56570*x^36 + 95179*x^35 + 156966*x^34 + 253481*x^33 + 401567*x^32 + 625401*x^31 + 958535*x^30 + 1445937*x^29 + 2146032*x^28 - 14876717*x^27 + 27988132*x^26 - 67668939*x^25 + 58869608*x^24 - 83388942*x^23 + 35876183*x^22 - 41118035*x^21 + 4470256*x^20 - 10536645*x^19 - 1686013*x^18 - 2166108*x^17 - 678396*x^16 - 173954*x^15 + 547214*x^14 + 1380456*x^13 + 2396085*x^12 + 3522988*x^11 + 4640412*x^10 + 5568803*x^9 + 6060645*x^8 + 5791299*x^7 + 5266737*x^6 + 3665836*x^5 + 2748347*x^4 + 1254029*x^3 + 738807*x^2 + 174714*x + 73815)*y^6
	+ x^9*(595*x^38 + 945*x^37 + 1895*x^36 + 3566*x^35 + 6160*x^34 + 10060*x^33 + 15830*x^32 + 24215*x^31 + 36141*x^30 + 52715*x^29 + 75225*x^28 + 105140*x^27 + 144110*x^26 - 2155094*x^25 + 3005620*x^24 - 7287385*x^23 + 5034750*x^22 - 6812463*x^21 + 2227645*x^20 - 2475137*x^19 + 217098*x^18 - 406234*x^17 + 30100*x^16 + 42403*x^15 + 114443*x^14 + 158928*x^13 + 207216*x^12 + 256085*x^11 + 301382*x^10 + 338023*x^9 + 359993*x^8 + 360346*x^7 + 331205*x^6 + 263762*x^5 + 203018*x^4 + 107713*x^3 + 67256*x^2 + 17908*x + 8436)*y^5
	- x^9*(35*x^36 + 80*x^35 + 151*x^34 + 263*x^33 + 431*x^32 + 670*x^31 + 995*x^30 + 1421*x^29 + 1963*x^28 + 2636*x^27 + 3455*x^26 + 4435*x^25 + 5591*x^24 - 242962*x^23 + 258391*x^22 - 597485*x^21 + 317408*x^20 - 393323*x^19 + 92873*x^18 - 90002*x^17 + 11305*x^16 - 354*x^15 + 10171*x^14 + 11830*x^13 + 13382*x^12 + 14731*x^11 + 15781*x^10 + 16436*x^9 + 16600*x^8 + 16177*x^7 + 15071*x^6 + 13186*x^5 + 10426*x^4 + 6695*x^3 + 4312*x^2 + 1396*x + 703)*y^4
	+ x^9*(x^34 + 3*x^33 + 6*x^32 + 10*x^31 + 15*x^30 + 21*x^29 + 28*x^28 + 36*x^27 + 45*x^26 + 55*x^25 + 66*x^24 + 78*x^23 + 91*x^22 - 20720*x^21 + 16695*x^20 - 34952*x^19 + 13129*x^18 - 14170*x^17 + 2147*x^16 - 1263*x^15 + 542*x^14 + 566*x^13 + 580*x^12 + 584*x^11 + 578*x^10 + 562*x^9 + 536*x^8 + 500*x^7 + 454*x^6 + 398*x^5 + 332*x^4 + 256*x^3 + 170*x^2 + 74*x + 38)*y^3
	+ x^9*(1275*x^19 - 714*x^18 + 1299*x^17 - 266*x^16 + 237*x^15 - 15*x^14 - 14*x^13 - 13*x^12 - 12*x^11 - 11*x^10 - 10*x^9 - 9*x^8 - 8*x^7 - 7*x^6 - 6*x^5 - 5*x^4 - 4*x^3 - 3*x^2 - 2*x - 1)*y^2
	- x^24*(51*x^2 - 15*x + 23)*y
	+ x^24;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
